## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**SHIP_CHARGE_REQ** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (PART_LOCN -> LOCN); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NUM -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (LINE -> RECORD_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**SHIP_DAYS** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO -> CUSTOMER); OE_CARRIER (CARRIER_CD -> CARRIER_CD); OE_MULTI_SHIP (SHIPTO -> SHIP_SEQ)

**SHIP_KEYS** -> BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL -> WAYBILL_NO); FACILITY_CODES (FACILITY -> CODE); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NUMBER -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_SUFFIX -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**SHIP_LABEL_ITEM** -> BIN_MASTER (BIN -> BIN); BOL_CARTON_NUM (CNTNR_NO -> CRTN_NO); BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); ITEM_MASTER (HEAT->HEAT, LOT->LOT, SERIAL->SERIAL_NUMBER); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (PLIST -> INVOICE); ORDER_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**SHIP_LABEL_PART** -> BOL_CARTON_NUM (CNTNR_NO -> CRTN_NO); BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); BOL_PACK_DTL (PALLET_NO -> PLLT_NO); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); INV_CROSS_REF (CUST_PART -> CUSTOMER_PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (PLIST -> INVOICE); ORDER_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX); UM_CODES (UM -> CODE); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**SHIP_SCHED_Q** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**SHIP_SCH_COMMENTS** -> OE_SHIP_SCHED (DUE_DATE->DATE_DUE, ORD_LINE->ORDER_LINE, ORD_NUM->ORDER_NO, ORD_SEQ->MULT_QTY_SEQ)
